name: MedReview Agent
description: Comprehensive medication review orchestrator that analyzes polypharmacy risks through cascade interaction analysis, organ-function dose checking, and deprescribing screening. Powered by FDA CYP450 knowledge base, AGS Beers Criteria 2023, and STOPPFrail criteria. Returns 5Ts output: Talk (narrative), Template (taper plans), Table (risk matrix), Transaction (FHIR updates), Task (pharmacy review items).

skills.name: Full Medication Review
skills.description: Complete polypharmacy analysis: cascade interactions + renal/hepatic dosing + deprescribing screening with 5Ts unified output
examples: Run a full medication review for patient with CKD Stage 4
Analyze all drug interactions for 78-year-old on 12 medications
Screen medications for deprescribing candidates in elderly patient

skills.name: Cascade Interaction Analysis
skills.description: Detect multi-drug CYP450 pharmacokinetic cascade interactions that pairwise checkers miss

skills.name: Organ-Function Dose Check
skills.description: Cross-reference medication dosing against renal (eGFR) and hepatic function with FDA labeling thresholds

skills.name: Deprescribing Screen
skills.description: Identify medication discontinuation candidates using AGS 2023 Beers Criteria and STOPPFrail with evidence-based taper plans
